Anneke Veldenmere is the founder of Marblepond Labs. Anneke wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

---
title: Marblepond Labs
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Anneke Veldenmere.
---

Marblepond Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Anneke Veldenmere. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Marblepond Labs call with Anneke Veldenmere.
Anneke is worried the Marblepond Labs pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
Anneke said Marblepond Labs hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
Anneke prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
